title: Holiday Bible fun at George Methodist Church
description: GEORGE NEWS - Parents looking for a...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Parents looking for a meaningful way to keep their children entertained these school holidays are invited to register them for a fun-filled, faith-based week at the George Methodist Church from Monday to Friday, 30 June to 4 July.


> The holiday programme, themed ‘Growing with Jesus’, is open to children from grades RR to seven.


It promises a week of engaging activities, spiritual growth and supervised fun led by a dedicated team of church leaders.

Children will be cared for from 08:00 to 12:30 daily, with registration opening at 07:30 each morning. All meals and drinks will be provided.

The goal is to create a safe, joyful space where children can experience the love of God while having fun. The programme will be run in English and will include stories, games, crafts and praise sessions.

Registration options include signing up at the church on the day, collecting a form at the church, or completing the online form via the QR code.

For more information, email [email protected] or call 044 873 3606.

Everyone is welcome.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
